summary: After the focused visual fix, the orchestrator reran targeted UI tests, started the local Vite app, reran the MZ-406 Playwright capture, inspected the regenerated laptop settlement/final screenshots, and reran full npm verification. The prior 1024x768 settlement score-change table clipping was not reproduced: the table now stacks rows with explicit labels and stays inside the central result panel horizontally.

commands_run.command: npm run test -- src/ui/render.test.ts src/ui/controller.test.ts src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts

commands_run.evidence: Vite served the app at http://127.0.0.1:5331/ with approved escalation. The server was stopped after capture.
Regenerated active, settlement, and final screenshots at 1280x800 and 1024x768. Capture metrics reported horizontalOverflow=false and no overflowingElements for all states.
13 test files passed, 126 tests passed, and tsc/vite production build passed.
